ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_number_115V" TEXT /* Part number for 115V version */,
  "part_number_230V" TEXT /* Part number for 230V version */,
  "part_number_240V" TEXT /* Part number for 240V version */,
  "part_number_400V" TEXT /* Part number for 400V version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market for which the part is intended */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the part */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the part in days */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger alerts */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to avoid overstocking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the part is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point to trigger new orders */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the reorder point is reached */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., active, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "manager_contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the warehouse manager */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current capacity of the warehouse */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the warehouse is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production line */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the production line */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line manager */,
  "manager_contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the production line manager */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the production line */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current capacity of the production line */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production line (e.g., active, on maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part used */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line where the part is used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the part was used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part used */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator who used the part */,
  "operator_contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the operator */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_usage_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_usage_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part ordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part ordered */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Supplier rating (1-10) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., 30 days, net 60) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_details" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "quantity_shipped" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part shipped */,
  "estimated_arrival_date" TEXT /* Estimated arrival date of the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipment */,
  "tracking_url" TEXT /* URL for tracking the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production manager, inventory controller, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the IMS */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the IMS was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part version */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the part */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_versions_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator who performed the maintenance */,
  "operator_contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the operator */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "downtime" INTEGER /* Downtime in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control check */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspector_contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the inspector */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the quality control check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production schedule */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production schedule */,
  "target_output" INTEGER /* Target output for the schedule */,
  "actual_start_date" TEXT /* Actual start date of the production schedule */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date of the production schedule */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the production schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_schedules_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand forecast */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "predicted_demand" INTEGER /* Predicted demand for the part */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., historical data, machine learning) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (0-1) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_forecasts_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)
